ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match took place */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the match was played */,
  "league" TEXT /* The league in which the match was played */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* The name of the stadium where the match took place */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of spectators who attended the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* The name of the referee */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* The final result of the match */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* The score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* The score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the player participated in */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player is associated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* The jersey number of the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* The number of minutes the player was on the field */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* The number of goals the player scored in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* The number of assists the player made in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* The number of yellow cards the player received in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* The number of red cards the player received in the match */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* The injury status of the player */,
  "transfer_status" TEXT /* The transfer status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* The league the team belongs to */,
  "coach" TEXT /* The name of the team's coach */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* The name of the team's home stadium */,
  "founded" TEXT /* The year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the league is based */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* The number of teams in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* The date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* A description of the injury */,
  "estimated_recovery_date" TEXT /* The estimated date of recovery */,
  "actual_recovery_date" TEXT /* The actual date of recovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who was transferred */,
  "from_team" TEXT /* The team the player transferred from */,
  "to_team" TEXT /* The team the player transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* The date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" TEXT /* The fee for the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
